Every cube has its own unique internal structure and feel, which means the smoothness after a lube service can vary from cube to cube — and that's completely normal! 

Here's what we'd recommend:

- Give it a few solves first. Lube takes a little time to spread evenly across all the internals, and once it does, you'll likely notice a significant improvement in how the cube feels and performs. Most cubers find that it gets much better after 20–30 solves.

- If you're still not happy with the feel after that, no worries at all, you can easily wipe out the lube using a soft tissue or a cotton cloth, and the cube will be back to how it was before.
And if you're still not satisfied with the lube service overall, please let us know at support@cubelelo.com.

I’m unable to process your refund/return/exchange request because the product delivered to you is completely fine if you are unsatisfied by the performance of the cube, it can be fixed with proper tensioning and lubricating.

The fix is extremely easy - it just requires a bit of speed cube lube.
Simply apply the lubricant between the pieces. After applying a few drops of lubricant, turn the side multiple times to work in the lubricant. 

If the moment is still not smooth you can apply more although keep in mind it is easier to apply lubricant rather than take it out so try to find the balance.

We always suggest our customers to lube and tension the cube as some cubes are not pre-lubed and it could be rough during initial solves.
